first-date.outro: you got through the first conversation

success: you park and see her wave from under the theater light
the night is awkward and sweet and it feels worth the risk you took
later you start texting every day and the road between you gets shorter
failure: you arrive flustered and the first hello lands off beat
you still sit together but the evening carries a small distance
you keep talking after that yet both of you learn how easily timing can hurt

prompts.reply: me too but in a good way
the one by the theater sign

prompts.incoming: ok im saving you a spot
prompts.reply: dont get a ticket for me
you havent even seen me yet

marriage.outro: the argument pauses but the tension stays

success: you make it home before the food goes cold
the talk is still heavy but you stay at the table and finish it together
weeks later the hospital calls start and the old arguments feel smaller
failure: you walk in late and tired and the room goes quiet first
the fight stretches into the night and nothing really gets resolved
when health scares begin you both carry this unfinished weight

prompts.incoming: will you be home by seven
you forgot to confirm the sitter
prompts.reply: texted her at lunch she said yes

prompts.incoming: i need you present tonight not half here
prompts.reply: i know im sorry traffic is bad
i remember im doing what i can

prompts.incoming: can you stop at the store
already on the list near the door

prompts.reply: i will call her back after dinner

prompts.incoming: please do not brush it off
i need a clear answer about saturday
prompts.reply: yes we can host i will clean sunday

dying-wife.outro: you keep driving but something is already slipping away

success: you reach her room and take her hand before the monitors settle
there is little left to say so you stay and breathe with her
afterward the silence follows you home and you finally stop replying while driving
failure: you reach the ward just after the room has gone still
family fills in the last minutes and you nod through words you cannot hold
on the drive back every notification sounds like something you cannot fix
